scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.package:dir: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:electron && npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/run-builder.mjs --dir --publish never
scripts.package:deb: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:electron && npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/run-builder.mjs --dir --publish never && node scripts/build-deb-manual.mjs
scripts.package:rpm: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:electron && npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/run-builder.mjs --linux rpm --publish never
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:electron && npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/run-builder.mjs --linux zip rpm --publish never && node scripts/build-deb-manual.mjs
scripts.package:dmg: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:electron && npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/run-builder.mjs --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:icons && npm run prepare:electron && npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && node scripts/run-builder.mjs --mac zip dmg --publish never
